user.title: Set up your Droprcam
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Droprcam on the local network.

data_description.rtsp_url: Leave blank to use the default Droprcam RTSP stream. Only change this if you are using go2rtc or an ffmpeg proxy.
Leave blank to use the default Droprcam RTSP stream. Only change this if you are using go2rtc or an ffmpeg proxy.
